subject: 📊 Daily Portfolio: Markets closed | VRDN PDUFA in 3 days — IBKR approval urgent
html_body:
Weekend Edition — Saturday, June 27, 2026 · Kuwait Time
Abbas Al Madani — Daily Portfolio Review
Account Status
$803.95 all cash
NYSE closed — Saturday. No open positions. Portfolio in cash since June 25 IBKR migration.
🎯 Withdrawal goal:$803.95 / $1,000 —$196.05 to go80.4%
🚨 TIME-CRITICAL — VRDN PDUFA IN 3 DAYS
Tuesday June 30 is VRDN PDUFA. IBKR approval is the only gate. If the account is not open by Monday evening Kuwait time, the entry window closes. Contact IBKR today — the online portal may give status visibility. Monday morning: first action of the day.
📊 Positions Snapshot — No open positions.
All 4 positions (NVDA, AVGO, LLY, TSM) closed June 25 for IBKR migration. Net P&L on those exits: NVDA −$32.99, AVGO −$12.05, LLY +$11.40, TSM +$8.83 = net −$24.81. Rebuilding once IBKR activates.
⏳ Pending Watchlist — Waiting on IBKR Approval

$17.90

Reward to TP2 ($37): +$19.10/sh = +$255.94 gross | +$252.94 net · R:R 5.62:1 ✅
Halal: ⚠️ UNVERIFIED — check Musaffa (interest income vs milestone revenue ratio unclear)
🚨 3 days to PDUFA. IBKR must approve by Monday close. Entry at $17.90 is 10.5% better than $20 target. Verify halal on Musaffa. When approved: enter $240 at ~$17.90, stop $14.50.
VERA — Vera TherapeuticsBUY NOW · 7/10

Original stop $24.50 is now 42% below current price. Thesis still intact (89% PDUFA probability) but entry mechanics changed. Run analyze VERA to re-derive updated stop before buying.
🟡 SOON: PDUFA July 7, 2026 — 10 days away · Atacicept (dual BAFF/APRIL inhibitor) for IgA Nephropathy

Thesis unchanged. Need updated stop closer to $35–37 (recent breakout base) to restore reasonable R:R.

When IBKR approved: run analyze VERA to get updated stop/TP at $42 entry. PDUFA July 7 gives you time. Don't rush — 24% price move materially changes the trade.
📡 Catalyst Plays — June 27, 2026
Weekend screen — FDA calendar doesn't pause on Saturdays
MNMD — Mind Medicine (MindMed) Inc. 🆕 NEWWATCH
Catalyst: Panorama Phase 3 (GAD — MM120 lysergide) topline data July 1, 2026 — 4 days away
Confirmatory Phase 3 of MM120 (pharmaceutical LSD) for Generalized Anxiety Disorder. Phase 2 data published in JAMA. ~140 patients, primary endpoint MADRS reduction at week 6.
Market cap
~$584M ↓ from $2.07B April 2026
Cash runway
~$450M+ (Oct 2025 offering)
Probability: ~55% — Phase 3 CNS base rate; strong Phase 2 JAMA signal but confirmatory Phase 3 CNS historically 50–55%
✅ If positive
~$22–28 (+47–87%)
NDA filing accelerated; prior Phase 3 GAD binary analogs moved +60–80%
💀 If negative
~$7–10 (−33–53%)
Lead program fails; stock already down 72% from April peak — institutional distribution visible
Smart money: Stock fell 72% (from $2.07B to $584M) April–June without announced bad news. Suggests institutional distribution ahead of data. Yellow flag.
Halal: ⚠️ LIKELY CONCERNS — MM120 is pharmaceutical LSD (lysergide d-tartrate). AAOIFI standards on consciousness-altering substances likely apply. Check Musaffa specifically before any consideration.
Pre-score: 3/5 (2pts event timing + 1pt multi-source) → WATCH — halal concern likely disqualifies for this portfolio. Do not enter until Musaffa explicitly clears. Say "analyze MNMD" for full deep dive.

💵 Cash Deployment — $803.95 Available
Reserve math: $803.95 − $3 buy commission − $3 reserve = $797.95 deployable. 30% cap per position: $803.95 × 0.30 = $241.19 max per name.
Priority order when IBKR approves:
1st — VRDN (~13.4 sh × $17.90 = $239.86 + $3 commission): PDUFA June 30 — 3 days. Best R:R (2.97:1 to TP1). Entry at $17.90 is 10.5% below original $20 target. IBKR clock is ticking.
2nd — VERA (re-analyze first at $42 — run analyze VERA): PDUFA July 7 — 10 days. More runway. Price jumped 24% — don't rush.
3rd — OTLK/MNKD: Available NOW on current broker, no IBKR needed. Verify halal on Musaffa, then enter if clear. 29–32 days to respective PDUFAs.
⚡ Weekend action items:
1. Check IBKR portal today — get approval status
2. Musaffa check on VRDN — only remaining gate for that entry
3. If OTLK halal clears: can deploy $241 on current broker today (no IBKR needed)
4. Do not enter VERA until re-analyzed at new $42 price
5. MNMD: halal check required — likely doesn't clear AAOIFI
Your call.
📚 Today's Concept — Day 29 of 30
Hyperscaler Capex Part 2 — The Actual Dollar Flows
You just cleared out of NVDA, AVGO, and TSM for the IBKR migration. When you redeploy into semis, knowing the hyperscaler flow is how you time re-entry. Here's the transmission: MSFT alone guides ~$80B capex this year. Roughly 40% goes to equipment — of that, ~50% flows to AI accelerators (NVDA), ~15% to networking (AVGO), ~15% to memory (MU/Hynix). Multiply by four hyperscalers ($725B combined 2026 guidance) and ~$120B is flowing directly to NVDA's addressable revenue. When MSFT or META raises capex on their quarterly call, NVDA's forward revenue estimate gets revised up in real time by every sell-side model. You don't wait for NVDA's own earnings — you read the hyperscaler calls first. The 6–8 week lag between hyperscaler capex guidance and NVDA revenue recognition is your re-entry timing window into semis.
Also today:
Capex unit economics — revenue generated per dollar of hyperscaler capex. If the four giants spend $725B and AI cloud revenue grows less than proportionally, returns compress. This ratio declining = AI capex bubble warning. Track it quarterly when you're back in semis.
Prices sourced: VRDN $17.90 (Yahoo Finance, June 26, 2026) · VERA $42.20 (Yahoo Finance, June 26, 2026) · Last NYSE session prior to weekend close
